name: Riscon
notes: Could not locate a public website with extractable content — needs user input. Found one signal: an Instagram account at https://www.instagram.com/riscon.norge/ which displays a 'RisCon' logo but provides no scrapable details about location, dates, format, or a website. No matches on rostercon.com Norway listings, no domain at riscon.no responding to search, and no mentions on Magicon community / cosplay.no / fancons.com directories. A Yelp listing exists for a 'RISCON' professional services business in Tromsø (Blårevsvingen 3) — almost certainly unrelated to a convention. Recommend asking the convention organisers directly via the Instagram DM for site / dates / venue.
